vsi.question: You are a robot beginning at the sink and facing the sink. You want to navigate to the refrigerator. You will perform the following actions (Note: for each [please fill in], choose either 'turn back,' 'turn left,' or 'turn right.'): 1. [please fill in] 2. Go forward until the wall. 3. [please fill in] 4. Go forward until the refrigerator. You have reached the final destination.
